description_long: This is a stylized adult pedestrian figure dressed in casual, urban attire. The individual wears a cropped hooded jacket with a visible zipper and a graphic on the back, paired with loose-fitting pants that have a subtle pattern. The figure's hands are extended horizontally, and the head is partially covered by the hood, with hair visible on one side. The shoes are athletic sneakers with laces, and the overall build is slender and youthful. The clothing features layered elements, such as a visible undershirt beneath the jacket. The figure's posture and attire suggest a relaxed, streetwise character suitable for contemporary city environments.
description: A casually dressed adult pedestrian in a hooded jacket, patterned pants, and sneakers, with a relaxed, urban style. The figure has a slender build and a partially covered head with visible hair.
description_view_0: Front view showing the hooded jacket, exposed midriff, patterned pants, and sneakers, with arms extended and hair partially visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the hood, the side seam of the pants, and the sneaker's side details.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back graphic on the jacket, the hood fully up, and the back of the pants and shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the hood's contour, side of the pants, and sneaker profile.
attribute_clothing_type: cropped hooded jacket, loose patterned pants, athletic sneakers, layered with an undershirt
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length straight hair, partially covered by hood
